task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness Web Admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser should be open to the Nx Witness Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001, showing the user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Configure the Generic Event trigger with the correct source and caption
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event rule configuration screen showing the 'Event' type set to 'Generic Event', the 'Source' field containing 'AI_Analytics', and the 'Caption' field containing 'Loitering_Detected'.

task_completion.description: Configure the rule action to create a bookmark on the target camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: The action section of the event rule showing the action type set to 'Bookmark' (or 'Create Bookmark') and the target camera explicitly set to 'Parking Lot Camera'.

task_completion.description: Simulate the event via the /api/createEvent API endpoint
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, browser, or API client showing an HTTP request (e.g., curl) made to 'https://localhost:7001/api/createEvent' that includes parameters for source ('AI_Analytics') and caption ('Loitering_Detected').

task_completion.description: Confirm the bookmark appears on the camera's timeline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness interface (camera view or bookmark log) showing a newly created bookmark for 'Loitering_Detected' associated with the 'Parking Lot Camera'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness Web Admin interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the genuine Nx Witness web interface with standard UI elements, not a text editor, mockup, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the API request was actually executed and not just typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or API client should show a successful HTTP response (e.g., 200 OK or JSON response from the Nx server) following the request to /api/createEvent.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmark verification is authentic
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmark must be visible within the actual VMS interface or timeline, without signs of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake the UI text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera for the bookmark must be exactly 'Parking Lot Camera'. The Generic Event rule must use 'AI_Analytics' as the event source and 'Loitering_Detected' as the event caption. The API endpoint used to simulate the event must be 'https://localhost:7001/api/createEvent'.
